query:
SELECT u.name AS engineer_name, scr.businessDate, scr.supportTask, ROUND(scr.supportHours, 2) AS support_hours,
       ROUND(scr.supportHours * 0.125 * 100, 2) AS support_display_points
FROM support_compensation_records scr
JOIN users u ON u.id = scr.userId
WHERE u.name IN ('宥凱','小周')
  AND scr.businessDate >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND scr.businessDate < DATE_ADD(LAST_DAY(CURDATE()), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY u.name, scr.businessDate, scr.id;
